title: 頼れるトレーナーとは…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of Super Creek's skills has spread beyond the campus, giving
birth to a new phrase that is now synonymous with her
name—"exceedingly talented."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I won first place! I know it was just a scrimmage, but I'm still
very happy about the results. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to her talent, her distinctive personality has also become
well-known.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Phew, it's hot today, isn't it? Oh... you're sweating a lot, Trainer. Let
me help you wipe it off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fish around in my pockets for my handkerchief, except it isn't there.
Looks like I forgot it...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't worry. I'll take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Stay still now. There we go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Somehow, I always wind up getting taken care of...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that feel much better now? ♪ Remember to check if you've
brought tissues or a handkerchief with you next time before you
leave, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her caring nature is wonderful, but I don't want her to keep spoiling
me like this. I need to step up—

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Second place, huh... You were close. What matters is that your time is
getting faster, so keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's all thanks to your guidance! I'm going to work even harder
from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I need to step up because trainers are supposed to be the rock that
trainees can lean on!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Really? Well then, shall we head off to lunch now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even at lunch, Super Creek continues to look after me. I rack my
brain to try and flip the situation around.
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do for you?
Is there anything I can do for you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Good question... Well, I'd love for you to have a balanced diet, so
please eat lots of veggies for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...This is just who I am—I love helping everyone. Being able to bring a
smile to someone's face makes me happier than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So don't worry about me. Let me keep doing what I do best. ♪
choice_data_list: But don't you also want to be helped?
But don't you also want to be helped?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I don't know. When I think back to my childhood, I don't
remember a time when I ever felt that way.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As a little kid, people often remarked how I never really needed
much help with anything. I was very easy to handle.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I remember taking care of other kids my age whenever they
were crying. I'd be making them feel better along with their parents.
choice_data_list: How are you always so caring and responsible?
How are you always so caring and responsible?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How? Hmm, that's a good question. It's hard to say...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Back home, watching the kids at our day care grow up, I began to
realize...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
At first, it's hard to do anything by yourself. We all need someone's
help to learn how to navigate the world around us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No matter who you may be, whether you're a parent, teacher, or
friend, we all can benefit from a little bit of love and support.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And that's why, if I can be a part of someone's journey of growth and
self-discovery... then isn't that just wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to help people develop themselves echoes the same
desire that trainers have toward their racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, I want nothing more than to help students achieve their
dreams of running faster than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm so happy you feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now I understand why you asked me that question earlier.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm, something that you can do for me... Oh, I know.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer... will you let me fix the button on your shirt?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It caught my eye earlier, and I haven't been able to stop thinking
about it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So please, give me your shirt for a moment. I'll be done in a second!
choice_data_list: I'm not doing anything for you though!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, you are doing something nice for me! This is what I want, so come here please. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day that I fully outgrow Super Creek's pampering still eludes
me...
